phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria per la chiesa, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyet-teh-REE-ah per lah KYEH-zah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the side entrance, on the right.

responses.english: At the side entrance, on the right.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trova l'Assunta di Bellini, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah las-SOON-tah dee bel-LEE-nee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the high altar, back of nave.

responses.english: On the high altar, back of nave.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah kyoo-DEH-teh OJ-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, è permesso fotografare le opere d'arte, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, eh per-MES-soh fo-toh-grah-FAH-reh leh OH-peh-reh DAR-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: No flash, solo per uso personale.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH FLAHS SOH-loh PEHR OO-soh pehr-soh-NAH-leh
likely_response.translation_en: No flash, only for personal use.

responses.english: No flash, only for personal use.
responses.phonetic: NOH FLAHS SOH-loh PEHR OO-soh pehr-soh-NAH-leh
responses.french: No flash, solo per uso personale.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un guardaroba per gli ombrelli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon goo-ar-dah-ROH-bah per LYEE om-BREL-lee, per fah-VOH-reh
